game_name: The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy

sub_pixel_system.notes: Text adventure game - sub-pixel systems not applicable

special_mechanics.name: Turn-based movement system
special_mechanics.description: Player navigates using text commands (e.g., 'north', 'south'). Most commands advance turn counter. Passive commands like 'look' and 'inventory' do not count as turns.

special_mechanics.name: Time pressure mechanic
special_mechanics.description: Some puzzles require completion within a fixed number of turns or game ends, requiring restart or load

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Text adventure game with no real-time physics mechanics. Traditional platformer movement parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) are not applicable. Game uses turn-based navigation and puzzle-solving rather than continuous physics simulation.
sources_used: wikipedia - The Hitchhiker's Guide to the Galaxy (video game)
